patterns.rationale: passive capture: every Stop turn appends the extractor's findings to the scratch session file
mode-transition guard: /pm-start /worker-start /board-pause /board-resume consult it for the refusal matrix
claim lifecycle: acquire -- atomic mkdir, owner.txt write, heartbeat init
claim lifecycle: heartbeat -- atomic-rename refresh of heartbeat.txt
claim lifecycle: release -- owner-verified rm -rf with NTFS retry
claim lifecycle: reclaim-stale -- python3 mtime-based stale claim cleanup
worker/PM registry: register this session on /pm-start and /worker-start
worker/PM registry: refresh this session's last_seen liveness signal each turn
PM pre-flight: refresh heartbeats for live registered claims before reclamation
/board-migrate: v0.3.0 board data migration (apply/rollback/status)

/board-migrate --relocate: move docs/boards/

to engineering-board/
permission self-check: compares this manifest against your settings allowlist
/board-view: generate the self-contained HTML board view (board.html)
/board-remember: explicit learning capture -- writes learnings/L###-<slug>.md + its BOARD.md row
Start PM (consolidator) session for engineering board
Start TDD-discipline worker session
Start review-discipline worker session
Start validate-discipline worker session
Install plugin allowlist (interactive)
Manual claim release (impatient-user UX)
